meta_description: If you live in Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley or Upper Hulme, please do take a few minutes to fill in my The Year of the Moorlands Village Residents Survey.
headings: h3: Dame Karen Bradley MP Member of Parliament for Staffordshire Moorlands
text_excerpt: Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey | Karen Bradley MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Karen News Campaigns Contact Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey In Parliament Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Residents Survey Tweet If you live in Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley or Upper Hulme , please do take a few minutes to fill in my The Year of the Moorlands Village Residents Survey. Please email me on karen.bradley.mp for individual cases - I am here to help. 2026 Residents Survey Current Gradbach, Heaton, Meerbrook, Thorncliffe, Swythamley & Upper Hulme Survey Your details Leave this field blank 1. How long have you lived in your village? 2. What is the best thing about your village? 3. Which of these local issues are you concerned about? Broadband Crime and Anti-Social behaviour Devolution Environmental Issues Health and Social Care Housing Planning issues Potholes Speeding and Highways Transport Other If other, please give details: 4. Which is the most important local issue for you? Choose one. Which of these national issues are important to you? Cuts to Winter Fuel Payments Cuts to PIP Devolution Education Immigration NHS and Social Care Our relationship with EU Pensions Support for Businesses Support for our Farmers The Economy Other If other, please give details: 6. Which is the most important of the above national issues for you? Choose one. Cuts to Winter Fuel Payments Cuts to PIP Devolution Education Immigration NHS and Social Care Our relationship with EU Pensions Support for Businesses Support for our Farmers The Economy 7.
